THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MAC KAY, ROBERT J. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VAN ECKHARDT, BERNICE $1,650.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,700.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

FILING OF CLAIM OF EXEMPTION - BANK LEVY RECEIVED & FILED. (THE BANK IS CURRENTLY HOLDING $1,838.93 RECEIVED FROM BANK LEVY)

THE CLAIM OF EXEMPTION SET FOR NOV-18-2010 IS DENIED. THE LEVYING OFFICER SHALL RELEASE FUNDS HELD PURSUANT TO LEVY TO THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR TO THE EXTENT NECESSARY TO SATISFY JUDGMENT AND COSTS OF LEVY. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT.
